accepted.reason: 3-state per-row DP over grid paths is a strong standalone optimization kernel.
Bitwise parity-based Walsh transform loops are compact and conversion-friendly.
Streaming moments updates and linear force evaluators are useful numeric primitives.
Fourier partial sums and sampling-index kernels provide clear loop-based workloads.
